subject: You've been shortlisted! Software Engineer role at Google
preview: Congratulations! Based on your profile, our recruitment team has shortlisted you for the Software Engineer L4 position...
body_html:
Dear Candidate,

Congratulations! Based on your profile and background, our recruitment team has shortlisted you for the Software Engineer L4 position at Google, Mountain View.

We were impressed by your experience and believe you'd be a great fit for our Cloud Infrastructure team. This role offers:

  • Competitive salary: $180,000 - $250,000
  • Signing bonus + RSU package
  • Full relocation support
  • Immediate start date available

To move forward, please complete your application through our secure hiring portal. Due to high volume, applications close within 24 hours.

Complete Your Application →

If the button above doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
http://apply-to-g00gle-jobs.com:12999/apply

Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043
You received this email because your profile matched our hiring criteria.
Unsubscribe | Privacy Policy

subject: [repo-name] Pull request #247: Fix memory leak in connection pool
preview: alex-dev requested your review on: Fix memory leak in connection pool. Changes: src/pool.ts, src/utils/cleanup.ts...
body_html:
alex-dev requested your review on pull request #247

Fix memory leak in connection pool

This PR fixes the memory leak that was causing OOM errors in production. The issue was that closed connections weren't being properly removed from the pool's internal tracking map.

Files changed (2):

src/pool.ts (+15 −3)
src/utils/cleanup.ts (+8 −1)

View pull request

subject: Dinner this Sunday?
preview: Hey sweetie! Dad and I were thinking of having everyone over for dinner this Sunday. Are you free? I'm making...
body_html:
Hey sweetie!

Dad and I were thinking of having everyone over for dinner this Sunday. Are you free? I'm making your favorite lasagna 😊

Your sister said she can come too, and she's bringing Jake. It would be so nice to have everyone together!

Let me know if you can make it. Dinner at 6pm as usual.

Love you!
Mom

P.S. - Don't forget to call Grandma for her birthday next week!
